headline.title: OpenAI is reportedly preparing legal action against Apple; it wouldn’t be the first partner to feel burned

headline.title: OpenAI says hackers stole some data after latest code security issue
headline.summary: OpenAI said the damage was limited to the employees’ devices and did not affect user data nor its production systems, and none of its intellectual property was stolen.

headline.title: How ChatGPT adoption broadened in early 2026
headline.summary: ChatGPT adoption surged in Q1 2026, with fastest growth among users over 35 and more balanced gender usage, signaling broader mainstream AI adoption.
